summary: The PR fails the "Check Changelog Entry" job because it is missing a required changelog entry for the v1.16 release. The job validation expects all PRs to include a changelog entry before they can be merged.
root_cause: PR is missing a required changelog entry for the v1.16 release. The "Check Changelog Entry" job validates that all PRs include a changelog entry and this assertion is failing.

evidence.quote: Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add ...
evidence.reason: Error message explicitly states the PR is targeting v1.16 and needs a changelog entry added
Warning references the changelog warning format, confirming the job is checking for changelog structure
Job name directly indicates it validates the presence of changelog entries in PRs

suggested_fix: Add a changelog entry file to the PR that documents the changes for the v1.16 release, following the Terraform changelog format conventions

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
